violations.text: Inspector observed several food storage contains stacked on top of each other, with moisture, on the drying rack. PIC notified. New Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2025
Sanitizer pre-mixer located at the 3 bay sink area was not in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2025

The walls near the mop sink and grease trap have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2025
No person certified in food safety was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2024
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2024

The following has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris: 1. floors and walls near 3 bay sink 2. drains by 3 bay sink 3. debris in between tiled floor The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the fan shields for prep units have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2023
